reviews.comment:
La q limpia una vaga,se pasó  mirando el celu,le pedías algo y ni bola t daba,bastante sucios los baños

(Translated by Google)
The cleaning lady was lazy, she spent all her time looking at her phone, you'd ask her for something and she'd completely ignore you, the bathrooms were pretty dirty

reviewer.displayName: Cuando podemos Viajamos!! Y algo más

reviews.comment:
Execelente atención y servicios en el local. A unos metros del ingreso a la ciudad de San Martin de los Andes.
Limpio y ordenado. Cuenta con un arreglo de Rosas que son una belleza

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention at the shop. Located just a few meters from the entrance to the city of San Martín de los Andes.
Clean and tidy. It features a beautiful arrangement of roses.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtXzdTcFpREAE

reviews.comment:
No te aceptan pagar con la aplicación, no hacen el descuento de socio porque dicen que está caído el sistema hace varios días, me pareció que se aprovecharon

(Translated by Google)
They won't accept payments through the app, and they won't give the member discount because they say the system has been down for several days. I felt like they were taking advantage of the situation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtejdDRXd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Un dato importante es que es uno de los pocos lugares que venden gasoil común. Necesite una gomería un domingo y me ayudaron dándome el dato de  un gomero que trabaja en su casa. Me salvaron...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. An important detail is that it's one of the few places that sells regular diesel. I needed a tire repair shop on a Sunday and they helped me by giving me the contact information for a tire repairman who works from home. They saved me...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdC1TZjV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, variedad en el kiosco para comprar. Hay una sección de recuerdos de la zona para comprar, esto me encantó. Los baños bastante limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and a good variety of items at the kiosk. There's a section with local souvenirs, which I loved. The restrooms were quite clean.

reviews.comment:
Ir con tiempo... no es para gente apurada ... y ojo en que lateral de tu vehículo tenes la tapa de carga ... xque no cargas...

(Translated by Google)
Go with plenty of time... it's not for people in a hurry... and pay attention to which side of your vehicle the cargo cover is on... otherwise you won't be able to load it...
